moments.title: Wimbledon continues into second week
moments.blurb: The prestigious Grand Slam tennis tournament, Wimbledon, is in full swing, with today marking the start of the second week, building towards the finals.

angles.name: General Interest
angles.copy: Strawberries & Cream, Centre Court drama, and gripping tennis! Wimbledon 2026 continues today as the tournament enters its second week. Who are you backing for the title?

angles.name: UK Sport Focus
angles.copy: It's the second week of Wimbledon, and the tension is building! Every serve, volley, and smash brings us closer to crowning new champions. Catch all the action live!

moments.title: FIFA World Cup 2026 heats up
moments.blurb: The 2026 FIFA World Cup, hosted across North America, is well underway with group stage and knockout matches continuing throughout July, leading to the final on July 19.

angles.name: Global Football Buzz
angles.copy: The FIFA World Cup 2026 is delivering all the drama! Who's impressed you most so far, and which nation do you think will lift the trophy on July 19th?

angles.name: Match Day Excitement
angles.copy: Another day, another set of nail-biting matches at the World Cup! Don't miss any of the action as teams battle it out for a place in the next round.

moments.title: Tour de France 2026 kicks off
moments.blurb: The 113th edition of the Tour de France begins today, July 4th, with a team time trial in Barcelona, setting off on a three-week journey across France.

angles.name: Cycling Fans
angles.copy: Allez! Allez! The Tour de France 2026 officially begins today with the Grand Départ in Barcelona. Three weeks of gruelling but glorious cycling start now!

angles.name: General Interest
angles.copy: It's the start of one of the world's most iconic sporting events! The Tour de France is underway, promising incredible landscapes and fierce competition.

moments.title: Mumford & Sons headline BST Hyde Park
moments.blurb: Mumford & Sons are headlining British Summer Time Hyde Park today, July 4th, as part of the ongoing concert series in London.

angles.name: Live Music Buzz
angles.copy: London is buzzing! Mumford & Sons take to the Great Oak Stage at BST Hyde Park tonight. Who's there to sing along to 'Little Lion Man'?

angles.name: Band Specific
angles.copy: Mumford & Sons are bringing their folk-rock anthems to Hyde Park today! Expect an incredible atmosphere and a setlist full of hits.

moments.title: Duran Duran headline BST Hyde Park
moments.blurb: New Wave icons Duran Duran will headline British Summer Time Hyde Park tomorrow, July 5th, with support from Scissor Sisters and Nile Rodgers & Chic.

angles.name: 80s Legends Live
angles.copy: Get ready to dance! Duran Duran headline BST Hyde Park tomorrow, July 5th. Which of their timeless hits are you hoping to hear?

angles.name: London Gig Guide
angles.copy: Tomorrow, Hyde Park lights up with Duran Duran, Scissor Sisters, and Nile Rodgers & Chic! An unmissable lineup for a Sunday summer evening.

moments.title: Happy 76th Birthday, Huey Lewis!
moments.blurb: American singer Huey Lewis, frontman of Huey Lewis and the News, turns 76 tomorrow, July 5th.

angles.name: 80s Icon
angles.copy: Do you believe in love? Huey Lewis turns 76 tomorrow! Celebrate the legendary frontman of Huey Lewis and the News by cranking up your favourite hit.

angles.name: Music Trivia
angles.copy: Tomorrow, we celebrate the 76th birthday of Huey Lewis! From 'The Power of Love' to 'Hip to Be Square', what's your go-to Huey Lewis & The News track?

moments.title: Happy 67th Birthday, Marc Cohn!
moments.blurb: Grammy-winning singer-songwriter Marc Cohn, best known for his 1991 hit 'Walking in Memphis', celebrates his 67th birthday tomorrow, July 5th.

angles.name: Easy Listening Fave
angles.copy: Tomorrow is Marc Cohn's 67th birthday! Time to revisit the classic 'Walking in Memphis' and soak in those iconic piano chords.

moments.title: Happy 57th Birthday, RZA!
moments.blurb: Robert Fitzgerald Diggs, better known as RZA, the influential leader of the Wu-Tang Clan, turns 57 tomorrow, July 5th.

angles.name: Hip-Hop Legend
angles.copy: Tomorrow, we celebrate the 57th birthday of RZA! The mastermind behind the legendary Wu-Tang Clan. What's your favourite Wu-Tang track?

moments.title: Happy 47th Birthday, Shane Filan!
moments.blurb: Irish singer-songwriter Shane Filan, best known as a member of the pop group Westlife, turns 47 tomorrow, July 5th.

angles.name: Boyband Fave
angles.copy: Flying without wings! Westlife's Shane Filan celebrates his 47th birthday tomorrow. Send him your best wishes and your favourite Westlife song!

moments.title: Happy 51st Birthday, 50 Cent!
moments.blurb: Grammy-winning rapper, actor, and entrepreneur 50 Cent (Curtis Jackson III) turns 51 on Monday, July 6th.

angles.name: Hip-Hop Star
angles.copy: Go shorty, it's your birthday! 50 Cent turns 51 on Monday. What's your favourite track from the 'Get Rich or Die Tryin'' legend?

angles.name: Iconic Tracks
angles.copy: Still 'In Da Club' after all these years! Wishing a very happy 51st birthday to 50 Cent on July 6th. What's his ultimate banger?

moments.title: Happy 67th Birthday, John Keeble!
moments.blurb: John Keeble, the drummer for iconic New Romantic band Spandau Ballet, turns 67 on Monday, July 6th.

angles.name: 80s Legend
angles.copy: To cut a long story short... Spandau Ballet's John Keeble celebrates his 67th birthday on Monday! What's your favourite Spandau hit?

moments.title: Happy 86th Birthday, Ringo Starr!
moments.blurb: Legendary Beatles drummer Ringo Starr (Richard Starkey) celebrates his 86th birthday on Tuesday, July 7th.

angles.name: Beatles Icon
angles.copy: Peace and love! Ringo Starr turns 86 on Tuesday, July 7th. Celebrate the iconic drummer with your favourite Beatles or solo track!

angles.name: Music History
angles.copy: A very happy 86th birthday to the one and only Ringo Starr on Tuesday! What's your favourite Ringo moment?

moments.title: Happy 56th Birthday, Beck!
moments.blurb: Grammy-winning American musician, singer, songwriter, and record producer Beck (Bek David Campbell) turns 56 on Wednesday, July 8th.

angles.name: Alternative Icon
angles.copy: Two turntables and a microphone! Beck turns 56 on Wednesday. From 'Loser' to 'E-Pro', what's your favourite from the genre-bending artist?

angles.name: Music Playlist
angles.copy: Celebrate Beck's 56th birthday on July 8th by diving into his incredible catalogue. Which album is your go-to?

moments.title: Happy 62nd Birthday, Courtney Love!
moments.blurb: American singer, songwriter, and actress Courtney Love, frontwoman of Hole, turns 62 on Thursday, July 9th.

angles.name: Rock Queen
angles.copy: Live Through This! Courtney Love, the iconic frontwoman of Hole, turns 62 on Thursday. What's your favourite track from the grunge legend?

angles.name: 90s Nostalgia
angles.copy: Happy 62nd Birthday to the unforgettable Courtney Love on July 9th! Her influence on '90s rock is undeniable.

moments.title: Happy 51st Birthday, Jack White!
moments.blurb: Grammy-winning American musician, singer, songwriter, and producer Jack White, best known for his work with The White Stripes, turns 51 on Thursday, July 9th.

angles.name: Modern Rock Hero
angles.copy: Seven Nation Army couldn't hold him back! Jack White turns 51 on Thursday. What's your favourite track from the rock visionary?

angles.name: Guitar Legend
angles.copy: Happy 51st to the incredible Jack White on July 9th! His unique style and raw energy have defined a generation of rock music.

moments.title: Happy 33rd Birthday, Perrie Edwards!
moments.blurb: English pop singer Perrie Edwards, a member of the hugely successful girl group Little Mix, turns 33 on Friday, July 10th.

angles.name: Pop Queen
angles.copy: Shout Out To My Ex! Little Mix star Perrie Edwards turns 33 on Friday. Send your birthday love to the pop powerhouse!

angles.name: Girl Group Power
angles.copy: Happy 33rd Birthday to Perrie Edwards on July 10th! What's your favourite Little Mix anthem?

moments.title: Happy 56th Birthday, Jason Orange!
moments.blurb: Former Take That member Jason Orange, who was a singer, dancer, and actor with the iconic boyband, turns 56 on Friday, July 10th.

angles.name: Boyband Flashback
angles.copy: It Only Takes A Minute! Take That's Jason Orange turns 56 on Friday. What's your favourite memory of him in the band?

moments.title: Happy 72nd Birthday, Neil Tennant!
moments.blurb: Neil Tennant, lead vocalist and keyboardist for the legendary electronic pop duo Pet Shop Boys, turns 72 on Friday, July 10th.

angles.name: Synth-Pop Pioneer
angles.copy: West End Girls and beyond! Neil Tennant of Pet Shop Boys turns 72 on Friday. What's your all-time favourite track from the duo?

moments.title: Happy 87th Birthday, Mavis Staples!
moments.blurb: American rhythm and blues and gospel singer Mavis Staples, a member of the Staple Singers, turns 87 on Friday, July 10th.

angles.name: Soul Legend
angles.copy: I'll Take You There! The legendary Mavis Staples celebrates her 87th birthday on Friday. An incredible voice that has spanned decades!
